eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Salt Lake, UT; at 04:10 PM ON MAY 19, 2026 Effective until 04:10 PM MAY 20, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Boil Water Issued for water customers in Riverton City. Boil Water Order issued for water customers between Jordan River to 3200 W, 11800 S to Bangerter. BOIL YOUR WATER BEFORE USE. DO NOT DRINK THE WATER WITHOUT BOILING. Boil water for 1 minute, & cool before use. Boiled/bottled water should be used for drinking, ice, brushing teeth, washing dishes, & food prep until further notice.
